subject: [RFC PATCH 16/45] mm: page_alloc: add background superpageblock defragmentation worker

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch adds a background worker to defragment superpageblocks when free space is low. The worker evacuates movable pages from tainted superpageblocks, targeting specific blocks rather than scanning the entire system. Defrag is triggered when a tainted block has less than 2 pageblocks of free space or no movable pages remain. Clean superpageblocks are skipped as they don't need defragmentation. The patch replaces an older per-pageblock evacuation plumbing with a more efficient background worker.
